# Thailand Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Thailand's administrative hierarchy:
> 77 provinces, 928 districts, 7,364 subdistricts.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total provinces: 77
- Total districts: 928
- Total subdistricts: 7,364
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-06-01
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All provinces (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-province.json)
- [All districts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-district.json)
- [All subdistricts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-subdistrict.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Province

- [Bangkok](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bangkok-10/) — 50 districts, 154 subdistricts
- [Samut Prakan](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/samut-prakan-11/) — 6 districts, 50 subdistricts
- [Nonthaburi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nonthaburi-12/) — 6 districts, 52 subdistricts
- [Pathum Thani](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/pathum-thani-13/) — 7 districts, 60 subdistricts
- [Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/phra-nakhon-si-ayutthaya-14/) — 16 districts, 207 subdistricts
- [Ang Thong](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ang-thong-15/) — 7 districts, 73 subdistricts
- [Loburi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/loburi-16/) — 11 districts, 121 subdistricts
- [Sing Buri](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sing-buri-17/) — 6 districts, 43 subdistricts
- [Chai Nat](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/chai-nat-18/) — 8 districts, 53 subdistricts
- [Saraburi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/saraburi-19/) — 13 districts, 109 subdistricts
- [Chon Buri](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/chon-buri-20/) — 11 districts, 92 subdistricts
- [Rayong](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/rayong-21/) — 8 districts, 56 subdistricts
- [Chanthaburi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/chanthaburi-22/) — 10 districts, 76 subdistricts
- [Trat](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/trat-23/) — 7 districts, 37 subdistricts

- [Sa Kaeo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sa-kaeo-27/) — 9 districts, 59 subdistricts
- [Nakhon Ratchasima](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nakhon-ratchasima-30/) — 32 districts, 285 subdistricts
- [Buri Ram](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/buri-ram-31/) — 23 districts, 189 subdistricts
- [Surin](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/surin-32/) — 17 districts, 159 subdistricts
- [Si Sa Ket](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/si-sa-ket-33/) — 22 districts, 204 subdistricts
- [Ubon Ratchathani](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ubon-ratchathani-34/) — 25 districts, 219 subdistricts
- [Yasothon](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/yasothon-35/) — 9 districts, 79 subdistricts

- [Nong Bua Lam Phu](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nong-bua-lam-phu-39/) — 6 districts, 59 subdistricts

- [Kanchanaburi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kanchanaburi-71/) — 13 districts, 95 subdistricts
- [Suphan Buri](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/suphan-buri-72/) — 10 districts, 109 subdistricts
- [Nakhon Pathom](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nakhon-pathom-73/) — 7 districts, 106 subdistricts
- [Samut Sakhon](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/samut-sakhon-74/) — 3 districts, 40 subdistricts

- [Phangnga](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/phangnga-82/) — 8 districts, 48 subdistricts
- [Phuket](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/phuket-83/) — 3 districts, 16 subdistricts
- [Surat Thani](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/surat-thani-84/) — 19 districts, 130 subdistricts
- [Ranong](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ranong-85/) — 5 districts, 30 subdistricts
- [Chumphon](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/chumphon-86/) — 8 districts, 70 subdistricts
- [Songkhla](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/songkhla-90/) — 16 districts, 127 subdistricts
- [Satun](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/satun-91/) — 7 districts, 36 subdistricts
- [Trang](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/trang-92/) — 10 districts, 90 subdistricts
- [Phatthalung](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/phatthalung-93/) — 11 districts, 65 subdistricts
- [Pattani](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/pattani-94/) — 12 districts, 115 subdistricts
- [Yala](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/yala-95/) — 8 districts, 58 subdistricts
- [Narathiwat](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/narathiwat-96/) — 13 districts, 77 subdistricts

- [Ranong](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/ranong-85.txt)
- [Chumphon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/chumphon-86.txt)
- [Songkhla](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/songkhla-90.txt)
- [Satun](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/satun-91.txt)
- [Trang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/trang-92.txt)
- [Phatthalung](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/phatthalung-93.txt)
- [Pattani](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/pattani-94.txt)
- [Yala](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/yala-95.txt)
- [Narathiwat](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/narathiwat-96.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (province), 2 (district), 3 (subdistrict)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Thailand Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions

- [ListBase](https://www.listbase.org) — Structured reference data for every country
- [open-admin-data](https://github.com/open-admin-data) — Open admin data for ASEAN
- [thailand-administrative-divisions](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions)
